Records.description: Four-loop HQET integral topology 5 for the matter-dependent cusp anomalous dimension at small angle. Defined via 16 propagators D_k with G(a1,...,a16) = e^{4 eps gamma_E} int prod D_k^{-a_k}, restricting a1=a3=0 and a4,a5,a10,a11>=0. Contains 3 HQET (Wilson line) propagators linear in v.k_i combinations and 7 standard massless quadratic propagators. Two of the three new master integrals belong to this topology. Computed via Feynman parametrization and HyperInt, checked with FIESTA4. Topologies 1-3 are defined in the companion paper arXiv:1708.01221.
Records.location: Eqs. (3.5)-(3.6), Section 3.3, restrictions in Eq. (3.8), topology shown in Figure 2
